title: PM Workfront Lead Follow-Up Advisory Draft
objective: Extend the PM workfront from read-only readiness triage into an advisory-only PM-to-lead follow-up draft loop, preserving AI mutation authority as not admitted and avoiding assignment, status, schedule, auth, ingress, service, schema, or production-data widening.
required_inputs: PM Lane 001 workfront read model and /pm-review/workfront route
Read-only backend sidecar review from delegated explorer 019e2c2c-25c7-7242-8401-c0a10ff44ead
Read-only frontend sidecar review from delegated explorer 019e2c2c-3c1b-7c21-a299-c70b88893ed1
Focused backend and browser validation evidence
constrained_outputs: Row-level PM workfront advisory metadata for blocking issue IDs, blocking issue summaries, and deterministic lead follow-up briefs
Operations-web PM workfront UI affordance to reveal a lead follow-up draft for a selected row
Focused backend test coverage that proves the advisory fields remain draft-only and mutation authority remains not admitted
Focused Playwright coverage that proves the UI draft is rendered from row evidence and no mutation route is called
No SQL, schema migration, new service admission, auth or ingress widening, assignment mutation, schedule mutation, status mutation, autonomous AI action, or Operations Visibility reopening
validation_steps: Run focused mutation-seam PM workfront read-model pytest slice with SEAM_STORE_BACKEND=memory
Run operations-web typecheck after build-generated Next types are available
Run focused Playwright browser smoke for the PM workfront route
Run packet JSON validation and git diff whitespace checks before publication
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-002 is read-model and browser advisory work only. No SQL, schema migration, production data write, auth, or ingress change is authorized.
